name: Bryan Maxwell
data_note: Limited public information available. Check your county clerk's office or the Illinois State Board of Elections for filing info.
bio: Bryan Maxwell is an Assistant Research Scientist and Project Engineer at the Illinois Sustainable Technology Center at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign. He is running in the U.S. Senate Democratic primary on an anti-war, progressive platform. Completed a Ballotpedia Candidate Connection survey in 2025. (Source: Ballotpedia; ILSOS filing confirmed)
